creator: greg@fxis.fujixerox.co.jp
text:
Sun's JCE(Java Cryptograph Extension) is none exportable. other implementation is not. And must implements need JDK 1.2. But ABA-JCE need any version of JDK, And be exportable. Then I have create a new ports for JCE, And contribute.
